::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">1</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.3c11503" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
article URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">Probing Structural Transformations and Degradation Mechanisms by Direct Observation in SIFSIX-3-Ni for Direct Air Capture</span>

M. L. Barsoum<sup>#</sup>, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span><sup>#</sup>, H. Xie, Z. Chen, S. M. Vornholt, R. dos Reis, N. Burns, S. Kycia, K. W. Chapman, V. P. Dravid, and O. K. Farha

*J. Am. Chem. Soc.* **2024**, *146*, 10, 6557–6565.

<small>(#M.L.B. and J.H. contributed equally)</small>
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](01_2024_sifix/SIFSIX_TOC.jpeg)
:::

:::
